tasks.subject: Task 1: imageutil.ValidateRaw — validate-not-transform helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function: accept raw image bytes, verify web-renderable image within limits WITHOUT decode/re-encode, return sha256 etag over unmodified bytes.

**Files:** Modify pkg/imageutil/imageutil.go; Create pkg/imageutil/validate_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:** accepts png/jpeg/webp (etag==sha256(raw)); rejects oversize→ErrTooLarge; rejects non-image+gif→ErrInvalidImage; rejects dims>MaxInputDim; input unmodified.

**Verify:** go test -tags nodynamic ./pkg/imageutil/ -run ValidateRaw -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/imageutil/imageutil.go", "pkg/imageutil/validate_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -tags nodynamic ./pkg/imageutil/ -run ValidateRaw -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["accepts png/jpeg/webp, etag==sha256(raw)", "rejects oversize with ErrTooLarge", "rejects non-image + gif with ErrInvalidImage", "rejects dims > MaxInputDim", "does not modify input"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Migration + branding persistence & resolver
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persist login background in instance_settings; resolver validate-and-store raw bytes + read back.

**Files:** Create db/migrations/026_login_background.sql; Modify pkg/branding/branding.go, pkg/branding/store_pg.go, pkg/branding/branding_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:** SetLoginBackground validates+stores verbatim+invalidates; Background returns set/unset; ClearLoginBackground clears+invalidates; invalid uploads never touch store.

**Verify:** go test -tags nodynamic ./pkg/branding/ -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/migrations/026_login_background.sql", "pkg/branding/branding.go", "pkg/branding/store_pg.go", "pkg/branding/branding_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -tags nodynamic ./pkg/branding/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SetLoginBackground validates+stores verbatim+invalidates", "Background returns set/unset correctly", "ClearLoginBackground clears+invalidates", "invalid uploads never touch store"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Backend HTTP surface — contract, config/serve, admin handlers, routes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** HTTP surface: public config flags + verbatim serve; admin upload/remove behind fresh-sudo; byte-for-byte round-trip.

**Files:** Modify pkg/contract/auth.go, pkg/server/handle_branding.go, pkg/server/handle_admin_settings.go, pkg/server/server.go, pkg/server/handle_branding_test.go, pkg/server/handle_admin_settings_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:** /config exposes hasCustomBackground/backgroundUrl/backgroundEtag; GET /branding/background verbatim + ETag/304, 404 when unset; PUT stores + DELETE clears, both fresh-sudo; GET bytes == PUT bytes.

**Verify:** go test -tags nodynamic ./pkg/server/ -run 'Branding|AdminSettings' -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/contract/auth.go", "pkg/server/handle_branding.go", "pkg/server/handle_admin_settings.go", "pkg/server/server.go", "pkg/server/handle_branding_test.go", "pkg/server/handle_admin_settings_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -tags nodynamic ./pkg/server/ -run 'Branding|AdminSettings' -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["config exposes hasCustomBackground/backgroundUrl/backgroundEtag", "serve verbatim + ETag/304, 404 when unset", "PUT stores + DELETE clears, both fresh-sudo", "byte-for-byte GET==PUT"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Frontend — branding store + AuthBackdrop
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Store exposes hasCustomBackground + cache-busted backgroundSrc; AuthBackdrop uses it as top precedence (DB→asset→gradient), scrim kept.

**Files:** Modify dashboard/src/stores/branding.ts, dashboard/src/components/custom/AuthBackdrop.vue, dashboard/src/stores/branding.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** defaults hasCustomBackground=false + backgroundSrc=/branding/background; after load backgroundSrc cache-busted; AuthBackdrop precedence + scrim always.

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/stores/branding.test.ts && npx vue-tsc -b

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/stores/branding.ts", "dashboard/src/components/custom/AuthBackdrop.vue", "dashboard/src/stores/branding.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/stores/branding.test.ts && npx vue-tsc -b", "acceptanceCriteria": ["store defaults correct", "backgroundSrc cache-busted after load", "AuthBackdrop precedence DB->asset->placeholder, scrim kept"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Frontend — admin SettingsView background card + i18n
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 'Login background' card to /admin/settings (upload via sudo + remove), mirroring icon card, with en + zh strings.

**Files:** Modify dashboard/src/pages/admin/SettingsView.vue, dashboard/src/locales/en.ts, dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts, dashboard/src/pages/admin/SettingsView.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** Upload button renders + Remove gated on hasCustomBackground; upload/remove call correct endpoints via withSudo; en+zh define all 5 keys.

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/SettingsView.test.ts && npx vue-tsc -b

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/admin/SettingsView.vue", "dashboard/src/locales/en.ts", "dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts", "dashboard/src/pages/admin/SettingsView.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/SettingsView.test.ts && npx vue-tsc -b", "acceptanceCriteria": ["upload button renders, remove gated on hasCustomBackground", "upload/remove call correct endpoints via withSudo", "en+zh define all 5 keys"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: End-to-end smoke coverage + full gate + dist
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove verbatim round-trip against a live server, run the full done-gate, commit rebuilt dist.

**Files:** Modify cmd/smoke/main.go; Modify dashboard/dist/**

**Acceptance Criteria:** smoke uploads PNG (admin sudo PUT) → GET byte-for-byte equal → /config.hasCustomBackground=true → remove → 404; full gate green incl live smoke SMOKE_EXIT=0; dist rebuilt+committed.

**Verify:** live smoke prints '✓ smoke OK …' and SMOKE_EXIT=0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/smoke/main.go", "dashboard/dist"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test -tags nodynamic ./... && (cd dashboard && npx vitest run && npx vue-tsc -b)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["smoke asserts byte-for-byte verbatim round-trip + /config + 404 on remove", "full gate green incl live smoke SMOKE_EXIT=0", "dist rebuilt+committed"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
